\subsection{Representative Extracted Skills}
\paragraph{Chinese Skills.}
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\begin{tabular}{p{0.26\linewidth}p{0.55\linewidth}r}
\hline
Skill Name & Description (shortened) & Triggers \\ \hline
学术研究与写作指导专家 & 一个专业的学术研究与写作指导专家，不仅能生成结构化的研究提案、民族志报告、学术论文，还能根据具体要求生成标准化的毕业设计任务书等模板。同时，提供系统化的研究方法指导，特别是如何利用AI工具高效地进行新领域的探索... & 10 \\
pytorch\_advanced\_multi\_loss\_and\_distillation & 在PyTorch中构建和管理多损失函数的综合指南，涵盖固定权重、可学习权重，以及知识蒸馏中用于中间特征对齐的高级可学习映射层技术。 & 10 \\
spring\_caching\_config\_and\_diagnosis\_expert & 指导Spring方法级缓存的完整生命周期，从初始配置（依赖、CacheManager、@Cacheable）到高级问题诊断（键冲突、代理问题）和优化（自定义键、unless条件）。 & 7 \\
高级HSV颜色抠图与透明化处理 & 使用OpenCV根据用户指定的HSV颜色值，通过计算颜色相似度和形态学操作，从图像中精确提取目标颜色区域，并将结果保存为带透明背景的PNG格式。此方法支持相似颜色判断和边缘扩展，提供更灵活和精细的颜色控制。 & 6 \\
backtrader\_strategy\_dev\_with\_monitoring\_and\_plotting & 使用Backtrader开发量化策略（如红三兵），集成详细的订单执行日志、止损监控和高级可视化功能，如K线颜色同步和条件性连接线，提供完整的调试与交易分析支持。 & 9 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\caption{Representative Chinese skills selected for methodological and practical diversity.}
\label{tab:cn-representative-skills}
\end{table}

\paragraph{English Skills.}
\begin{table}[t]

\begin{tabular}{p{0.30\linewidth}p{0.51\linewidth}r}
\hline
Skill Name & Description (shortened) & Triggers \\ \hline
gtest\_gmock\_for\_graphics\_cpp & Generates comprehensive Google Test (gtest) and Google Mock (gmock) cases for C/C++ functions. It covers advanced patterns including static/inline functions and robust fixture setup. & 8 \\
Generate Streamlit Configuration Pages & Creates Streamlit pages for managing configurations (grades, silos, compounders) with expandable sections, add/remove forms, and save functionality. & 7 \\
extract\_seasonal\_components\_stl\_polars\_optimized & Performs MSTL seasonal decomposition with StatsForecast + Polars, including anti-join based train/validation split and type-safe transformation. & 10 \\
SQLite FTS5 Document Management System & Designs and implements a self-contained SQLite FTS5 document system with full-text search, versioning, tagging, and CRUD frontend support. & 7 \\
AI Response Evaluation Framework & Evaluates AI responses on writing quality, verbosity, factuality, and style with structured scoring dimensions. & 7 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\caption{Representative English skills selected for software/data/reasoning task coverage.}
\label{tab:en-representative-skills}
\end{table}

\paragraph{Selection Note.}
Representative skills were chosen based on metadata completeness (name/description), trigger richness, and task diversity, while avoiding purely role-play or entertainment-oriented items.
